> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add getsentry/sentry-for-ai --skill sentry-fix-issues --skill sentry-setup-ai-monitoring --skill sentry-sdk-setup -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/sentry-setup-ai-monitoring`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/sentry-setup-ai-monitoring.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add getsentry/sentry-for-ai --skill sentry-fix-issues --skill sentry-setup-ai-monitoring --skill sentry-sdk-setup -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Sentry skill for setting up AI/LLM agent monitoring: instrument LLM calls, tool usage, track agents (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel AI SDK, LangChain etc).

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add getsentry/sentry-for-ai --skill sentry-fix-issues --skill sentry-sdk-setup --skill sentry-setup-ai-monitoring -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=inspect-then-install; selector=named; policy=Inspect source, hooks, scripts, credentials, and dedupe before install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[getsentry/sentry-for-ai](https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-for-ai) (official Sentry)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other LLM observability / tracing skills (LangSmith, Phoenix, Arize, Helicone).
